title: Tome I Act 3: The Recursive Symbol

story.text:
# 📖 Tome I Act 3: The Recursive Symbol
**act** · shared · narrative

ARCH-1 canonical form (Σ := μS.(β ∨ Ω(S,S))) named in the narrative register. The recursive μ-fixpoint admits multiple inhabitants.
> *The symbol does not contain itself; it is contained-by-being-recurrent.*
